## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` / `ruff format --check` clean
- [ ] `mypy` clean
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated when user-facing
- [ ] No secrets or live API keys in the diff
